title: 天皇賞（秋）の後に・あげてけ！

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And they're into the stretch! Who's that coming
up on the outside?!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Oh, this is so close... Who's gonna win it? Who's
in the lead? Is that...

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: No way! How did she...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And here's Tosen Jordan! Tosen Jordan is pushing
to the front!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Jordan! Just a little more... Come on...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Go. Just like that!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: Tosen Jordan is holding on! She's still in the lead!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: You can do it! Go, go, go!

text_block_list.name: Gyarus
text_block_list.text:
Ruuun!
Get it, Jordaaaaan!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: HYAAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And Tosen Jordan does it! First place goes to
Tosen Jordan!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text: What the... No way...

text_block_list.name: Spectator D
text_block_list.text: Are you serious? Who could've seen this coming...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Haha... Ahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: How's that?! Did you see?! Fast, right?!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Shockingly fast, right?! Like nothing you've ever
seen before!

text_block_list.name: Spectator E
text_block_list.text: She definitely was fast. That was incredible.

text_block_list.name: Spectator F
text_block_list.text: Yeah. It was crazy...

text_block_list.name: Spectator G
text_block_list.text:
That was unbelieeevable! Tosen Jordan! You
nailed it!

text_block_list.name: Spectator H
text_block_list.text:
I'm speechless! What an awesome run! What a
great Tenno Sho!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Haha... Ahaha!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: More! More! I can't hear you! Make some noise!

text_block_list.name: Gyarus
text_block_list.text: You're so cool, Jordan!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Haha... I like this. I've never been so... hyped!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer. So, what'd you think?
choice_data_list: I never doubted you for a second.
I never doubted you for a second.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
That's it? C'mon, react harder. You think that's
enough praise?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Meh, whatevs...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: So, like, am I the greatest dummy ever or what?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
What a commotion. I'm not sure if I've ever heard
cheering and applause like this before.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tosen Jordan smiles sheepishly as the crowd roars
on.
